requirement_topic.en: GPL Grid Connection — 120/240 V, 60 Hz and Site Coordination
requirement_topic.zh: GPL并网接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及现场协调
requirement_topic.zht: GPL併網接入——120/240 V、60 Hz及現場協調

summary.en: Guyana Power and Light (GPL) is the utility for the main public grid areas and publishes a National Grid Code governing planning, interconnection, operation, minimum technical requirements, metering, voltage regulation, frequency behaviour, power quality, and data requirements. Guyana uses an Americas-style low-voltage environment commonly described for premises as 120/240 V, 60 Hz; charger suppliers should confirm the actual service voltage, phase availability, transformer capacity, protection, metering and load-management requirements for each GPL-connected site. Large public or fleet charging sites may require project-level coordination with GPL, and GEA policy material notes that grid interconnection requests must comply with GPL interconnection requirements for grid-connected energy systems.
summary.zh: 圭亚那电力公司（GPL）负责主要公共电网区域，并发布国家电网规范，涵盖规划、互联、运行、最低技术要求、计量、电压调节、频率行为、电能质量及数据要求。圭亚那低压用电环境通常按美洲体系描述为120/240 V、60 Hz；充电桩供应商应针对每个接入GPL的场址确认实际服务电压、相制条件、变压器容量、保护、计量及负载管理要求。大型公共或车队充电场站可能需要与GPL进行项目级协调；GEA政策资料也说明，并网能源系统须提交互联申请并符合GPL互联要求。
summary.zht: 圭亞那電力公司（GPL）負責主要公共電網區域，並發布國家電網規範，涵蓋規劃、互聯、運行、最低技術要求、計量、電壓調節、頻率行為、電能質量及數據要求。圭亞那低壓用電環境通常按美洲體系描述為120/240 V、60 Hz；充電樁供應商應針對每個接入GPL的場址確認實際服務電壓、相制條件、變壓器容量、保護、計量及負載管理要求。大型公共或車隊充電場站可能需要與GPL進行項目級協調；GEA政策資料也說明，併網能源系統須提交互聯申請並符合GPL互聯要求。

standards_or_laws: GPL National Grid Code — planning, interconnection, operation, minimum technical requirements and metering
GPL voltage regulation standards and power quality requirements
GEA policy reference to GPL interconnection requirements for public-grid interconnection
IEC 61000 series — electromagnetic compatibility and power quality

summary.en: China domestic EVSE is normally designed around 220 V single-phase / 380 V three-phase, 50 Hz supply, GB/T 18487.1-2023 conductive charging requirements, GB/T 20234 connectors, and local Chinese grid-operator acceptance. A China-market charger nameplate, transformer, rectifier, fan, meter and protection design may not automatically cover 60 Hz operation, 120 V Level 1 input, split-phase 240 V service, or GPL site acceptance documentation.
summary.zh: 中国国内EVSE通常按220 V单相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供电、GB/T 18487.1-2023传导充电要求、GB/T 20234接口及中国本地电网运营商验收设计。中国市场充电桩的铭牌、变压器、整流器、风机、计量和保护设计，不一定自动覆盖60 Hz运行、120 V一级输入、分相240 V服务或GPL现场验收文件。
summary.zht: 中國國內EVSE通常按220 V單相 / 380 V三相、50 Hz供電、GB/T 18487.1-2023傳導充電要求、GB/T 20234接口及中國本地電網運營商驗收設計。中國市場充電樁的銘牌、變壓器、整流器、風機、計量和保護設計，不一定自動覆蓋60 Hz運行、120 V一級輸入、分相240 V服務或GPL現場驗收文件。

standards_or_laws: China local grid operator project-acceptance requirements

gap.en: Exporters must confirm that the charger input range, control power, fans, meters, protection devices, RCD/GFCI strategy, surge protection and thermal design support Guyana's 60 Hz and 120/240 V supply conditions. For commercial AC and DC sites, prepare single-line diagrams, load calculations, harmonics data, demand-management settings, commissioning records, and any GPL forms requested by the site engineer or utility. A China domestic 50 Hz / 220-380 V design without 60 Hz and 120/240 V evidence is not grid-ready for Guyana.
gap.zh: 出口商必须确认充电桩输入范围、控制电源、风机、仪表、保护器件、RCD/GFCI策略、防雷浪涌保护和热设计均支持圭亚那60 Hz及120/240 V供电条件。商业交流和直流场站应准备单线图、负荷计算、谐波数据、需求管理设置、调试记录，以及现场工程师或GPL要求的表格。未提供60 Hz及120/240 V证据的中国国内50 Hz / 220-380 V设计，不具备圭亚那并网就绪性。
gap.zht: 出口商必須確認充電樁輸入範圍、控制電源、風機、儀表、保護器件、RCD/GFCI策略、防雷浪湧保護和熱設計均支持圭亞那60 Hz及120/240 V供電條件。商業交流和直流場站應準備單線圖、負荷計算、諧波數據、需求管理設置、調試記錄，以及現場工程師或GPL要求的表格。未提供60 Hz及120/240 V證據的中國國內50 Hz / 220-380 V設計，不具備圭亞那併網就緒性。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for GPL-connected installations where utility connection, metering, protection, load capacity, or power-quality review is required; exact service details must be confirmed per site
mandatory_status.cn: China local grid acceptance and 50 Hz nameplate evidence apply domestically and are not a GPL approval substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Guyana-ready chargers need explicit 60 Hz and 120/240 V input evidence plus GPL-facing site documentation. Treat China 50 Hz / 220-380 V grid evidence as a starting point only.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向圭亚那的充电桩须具备明确的60 Hz及120/240 V输入证据，并准备面向GPL的场址文件。中国50 Hz / 220-380 V并网证据只能作为起点。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向圭亞那的充電樁須具備明確的60 Hz及120/240 V輸入證據，並準備面向GPL的場址文件。中國50 Hz / 220-380 V併網證據只能作為起點。
